purpose: Executable Production V1 fixture map. This ties each release-gradebook fixture class to concrete tests or explicit gaps before normal users can be reopened.
safetyLane: No live-user mutation or non-Baylor/BP21 email proof is allowed from this map. It is a planning/test-selection artifact only.

statusLegend.covered: At least one existing deterministic test file is mapped to this fixture cell.
statusLegend.needs_fixture: The cell is required but needs a deterministic test fixture or stronger mapping.
statusLegend.needs_live_proof: Automated coverage is incomplete or insufficient without source-of-truth readback in the Baylor/BP21 proof.
